message:
Migrate 7 self-contained rusqlite sites in lib.rs to frankensqlite

Convert Connection::open + query_row patterns to frankensqlite equivalents
in status, health-check, doctor, and index functions. Each site opens its
own connection for quick queries (COUNT(*), meta lookups, idempotency).

Remaining rusqlite usage in lib.rs (LazyDb-dependent context/browse
functions, analytics pipeline) requires coordinated storage layer migration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
